scripts.setup: test -f packages/database/.env || cp packages/database/.env.example packages/database/.env && test -f packages/web/.env || cp packages/web/.env.example packages/web/.env && pnpm install && pnpm run db:start && pnpm --filter @book-manager/database migrate && pnpm --filter @book-manager/database seed && pnpm --filter @book-manager/database check
scripts.clean: docker compose down && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules packages/*/.next packages/*/dist packages/*/.turbo
